item.title: Hims & Hers in Free Fall: Why Analysts See Nearly 150% Upside
item.description: HIMS is down 48% in the past month following a Novo Nordisk lawsuit. But, analysts expect record revenue when the company reports earnings this month.

item.title: Cadence Spikes Post-Earnings With Strong Interest in AI Products
item.description: Cadence Design Systems' latest earnings showed strong top and bottom line growth, and analysts are eyeing considerable upside ahead.
